en_title: Fallout: New Vegas Lead Designer Chris Avellone Admits He Feels 'Embarrassed' by TV Show's Dialogue
cn_title: 《辐射：新维加斯》首席设计师坦言被剧集对话尴尬到
subtitle: 好改编也有剧本短板
opus_summary: 《辐射：新维加斯》首席设计师Chris Avellone认为Amazon《辐射》剧集有趣、演员出色，但部分台词质量让他尴尬，并批评一些好莱坞编剧因不了解游戏背景而错失叙事机会。

paragraphs.en: Chris Avellone, lead designer for Fallout: New Vegas , admitted he feels "embarrassed" by some of the dialogue in the Amazon Prime Video adaptation.
paragraphs.cn: 《辐射：新维加斯》首席设计师Chris Avellone承认，Amazon Prime Video改编剧中的部分对话让他感到「尴尬」。

paragraphs.en: Avellone shared his opinion on the show during an episode of Insider Gaming’s Access Granted podcast, where he compared the series’ dialogue to that of other game adaptations like Cyberpunk: Edgerunners .
paragraphs.cn: Avellone在Insider Gaming的Access Granted播客一期节目中分享了对剧集的看法，并将其对话与《赛博朋克：边缘行者》等其他游戏改编作品相比。

paragraphs.en: “I kind of wish the game writing for TV shows like that, where they’re mimicking a game, they would kind of elevate it a bit,” he said. “Edgerunners was really cool, no problems there. But sometimes I wish the script quality on the Fallout TV show was a little higher.
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「我希望这种模仿游戏的电视剧能稍微提升一下游戏式写作。《边缘行者》很棒，完全没问题。但有时我希望《辐射》电视剧的剧本质量能更高一些。」

paragraphs.en: “I guess I feel embarrassed when I see some of the lines being done. But you know, it’s a fun show.”
paragraphs.cn: 「看到有些台词被演出来时，我想自己会觉得尴尬。不过你知道，这部剧还是很有趣。」

paragraphs.en: Avellone went on to state that he feels many, but not all, Hollywood writers tend to go in their own direction with game franchises and miss out on opportunities for good storytelling due to a lack of context from not playing the games in the series they are adapting.
paragraphs.cn: Avellone接着表示，他认为许多好莱坞编剧——但并非全部——在处理游戏系列时倾向于自行其是，又因为没有玩过所改编系列的游戏、缺乏背景理解，而错失讲好故事的机会。

paragraphs.en: “I don’t mean to put all Hollywood writers in this category, but I think some of them also still struggle with, ‘Okay, I’m writing a game franchise, and obviously, those game writers didn’t know what they were doing. I’m a respected Hollywood writer, and I know how these things are supposed to work,’” he continued.
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「我不是要把所有好莱坞编剧都归为这一类，但我认为有些人仍抱着这样的想法：『好吧，我在写一个游戏系列，显然那些游戏编剧不知道自己在做什么。我是受尊敬的好莱坞编剧，我知道这些事情该如何运作。』」

paragraphs.en: “I think, for some of them, it’s really easy to dismiss that work and go in their own direction, which they think is more solid. But the problem is, when they do that, they don’t have any sense of, they probably haven’t played Fallout 3 or Fallout 4 or New Vegas, so a lot of the context is gone, as well as opportunities.
paragraphs.cn: 「我认为，对其中一些人来说，否定原有作品并走自己的方向很容易，因为他们觉得自己的方案更可靠。但问题是，他们这样做时毫无感知；他们可能没玩过《辐射3》《辐射4》或《新维加斯》，因此大量背景和机会都消失了。」

paragraphs.en: “That’s not true of all Hollywood writers, but the general pattern that I’ve seen in the game industry is, they option out their franchise for tv or film, the studios are super happy with it, they sign the contracts, and then what happens is they just want to rush off and do their own take on what they believe it is. …I understand it, I just think it creates a lot of missed opportunities.”
paragraphs.cn: 「并非所有好莱坞编剧都这样，但我在游戏行业看到的普遍模式是：他们把系列的电视或电影改编权卖出去，工作室非常高兴，双方签署合同，随后对方只想赶紧按照自己理解的样子重新诠释……我能理解，只是觉得这造成了许多错失的机会。」

paragraphs.en: While Avellone clarified that he believes the series still makes for a fun watch, as well as being a fan of both Ella Purnell's and Walton Goggin's performances, his opinion differs slightly from that of Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer, who enthusiastically praised the show for being an “amazing adaptation” of the source material.
paragraphs.cn: Avellone澄清称自己仍觉得剧集很好看，也喜欢Ella Purnell和Walton Goggins的表演，但他的观点与《辐射：新维加斯》总监Josh Sawyer略有不同，后者热情称赞该剧是原作的「精彩改编」。

paragraphs.en: “Like, honestly. I know that the bar is not always very high for TV or film adaptations of video games, but I think it's one of the best that I've seen, certainly,” he said, adding that he’s curious to “see where it goes” in the future.
paragraphs.cn: Sawyer说：「说真的，我知道电子游戏影视改编的标准并不总是很高，但它肯定是我看过最好的作品之一。」他还表示很好奇未来「故事会走向何方」。

paragraphs.en: The third season of Amazon’s highly-praised Fallout series is projected to launch on Prime Video sometime in 2027, having recently added Star Wars: The Acolyte's Manny Jacinto to its cast. Bethesda development chief Todd Howard also noted that fans can look forward to “new things” in the show that were never seen before in the games, making specific mention of certain geographical locations.
paragraphs.cn: Amazon广受好评的《辐射》第三季预计于2027年某时登陆Prime Video，最近已邀请《星球大战：侍者》演员Manny Jacinto加盟。贝塞斯达开发负责人陶德·霍华德还表示，粉丝可以期待剧中出现游戏从未展示的「新内容」，并特别提到某些地理地点。
